Hi there,

I’ve noticed HubSpot’s unique agentic customer platform that unites marketing, sales, and customer service to deliver results fast. Many go-to-market teams face challenges with fragmented tools and processes slowing growth and efficiency. Since HubSpot is crafted for a delightful experience, I wonder if you’re exploring ways to further streamline workflows across your teams?

I’d love to share insights from other companies in the CRM space who’ve enhanced integration and automation successfully. Are you available next week for a brief chat?

Best regards,
[Your Name]

Hi,

I noticed GitHub recently enhanced its CodeQL engine to allow developers to define custom sanitizers and validators, which is a smart move towards better security. Many development teams face challenges managing security vulnerabilities like secret leaks in code repositories, which can be risky and affect workflow productivity.

I'd love to explore how we can support your teams in customizing code analysis to seamlessly fit your projects, complementing your existing tools.

Are you available for a brief call next week to discuss?

Best regards,
